text: Last summer vacation, my family went on a trip to Hualien. We visited Taroko Gorge and saw the beautiful marble cliffs. The weather was perfect, and the scenery took my breath away. I will never forget that amazing experience.
tips: vacation 的 /veɪˈkeɪʃən/，v 上齒咬下唇，重音第二節
Taroko 的 /təˈroʊkoʊ/，r 都要捲舌
breath 的 th 是無聲子音 /brɛθ/，和 breathe（動詞 /briːð/）不同
scenery 的 /ˈsiːnəri/，sc 發 /s/，不是 /sk/
explanation: 旅遊回憶，使用過去式。Taroko Gorge = 太魯閣峽谷。marble cliffs = 大理石峭壁。took my breath away = 美到令人屏息。

text: Climate change is a serious problem that affects everyone on Earth. Rising temperatures cause ice to melt and sea levels to go up. If we do not take action now, many coastal cities may disappear in the future. Every small effort counts.
tips: climate 的 /ˈklaɪmət/，第一個 i 發 /aɪ/，不是 /ɪ/
temperature 三個音節 TEM-pe-ra-ture，/ˈtɛmpərətʃər/
coastal 的 /ˈkoʊstəl/，/koʊ/ 雙母音，st 後接 l
disappear 重音第三節 dis-ap-PEAR，/ˌdɪsəˈpɪr/
explanation: 全球暖化議題。climate change = 氣候變遷。rising temperatures = 上升的氣溫。take action = 採取行動。Every small effort counts = 每個小努力都重要。

text: Smartphones have changed the way we live, work, and communicate. With just a few taps, we can send messages to friends around the world. However, spending too much time on screens may hurt our eyes and affect our sleep. We should find a healthy balance.
tips: changed 的 /tʃeɪndʒd/，d 後接 ʒ 再接 d，很容易卡住
communicate 的 /kəˈmjuːnɪkeɪt/，重音第二節，/mjuː/ 嘟嘴
however 的 /haʊˈɛvər/，重音第二節 ev
balance 的 /ˈbæləns/，重音第一節，/æ/ 張大嘴
explanation: 科技影響。have changed = 已經改變（現在完成式）。spend time on = 花時間在。affect our sleep = 影響睡眠。healthy balance = 健康的平衡。

text: The Lantern Festival is one of the most colorful celebrations in Taiwan. People write their wishes on sky lanterns and release them into the night sky. It is believed that the lanterns carry people's hopes to heaven. Thousands of glowing lights floating upward is truly a magical sight.
tips: lantern 的 /ˈlæntərn/，l 舌尖到上齒齦，æ 大嘴
release 的 /rɪˈliːs/，重音第二節，ea 長音 iː
thousands 的 th 是無聲子音 /ˈθaʊzəndz/，z 後接 ndz
magical 的 /ˈmædʒɪkəl/，g 發 /dʒ/，不是 /ɡ/
explanation: 節慶文化。Lantern Festival = 元宵節。release = 釋放。It is believed that... = 據信。floating upward = 向上飄浮。magical sight = 魔幻景象。

text: Thomas Edison failed thousands of times before he finally invented the light bulb. He once said, "I have not failed. I have just found ten thousand ways that will not work." His determination and patience inspire people all over the world. Never give up on your dreams, no matter how hard the journey seems.
tips: Thomas 的 th 是無聲子音 /ˈtɑːməs/，不是有聲
invented 的 /ɪnˈvɛntɪd/，v 上齒咬下唇，重音第二節
determination 五個音節 de-ter-mi-NA-tion，重音在 NA
patience 的 /ˈpeɪʃəns/，tie 發 /ʃ/，像「許」
explanation: 勵志人物故事。failed thousands of times = 失敗數千次。light bulb = 燈泡。determination = 決心。Never give up = 永不放棄。no matter how = 無論多麼。

text: A balanced diet, regular exercise, and enough sleep are the three keys to a healthy life. Instead of eating fast food every day, try to cook simple meals at home. Even a thirty-minute walk after dinner can make a big difference. Your body will thank you in the long run.
tips: balanced 的 /ˈbælənst/，æ 大嘴，l 舌尖，n 後接 st
exercise 三個音節 EX-er-cise，/ˈɛksərsaɪz/
difference 的 /ˈdɪfərəns/，注意 ff 短促，重音第一節
thank 的 th 是無聲子音，舌尖放齒間送氣
explanation: 健康生活建議。balanced diet = 均衡飲食。instead of = 而不是。make a big difference = 帶來很大改變。in the long run = 長遠來看。

text: One day, a thirsty crow found a pitcher with a little water at the bottom. She could not reach the water, so she dropped pebbles into the pitcher one by one. Slowly, the water rose to the top, and the clever crow finally drank it. This story teaches us that patience and creativity can solve difficult problems.
tips: thirsty 的 th 是無聲子音 /ˈθɜːrsti/，r 要捲
pitcher 的 /ˈpɪtʃər/，tch 發 /tʃ/，像中文「吃」
pebbles 的 /ˈpɛbəlz/，b 和 b 之間母音弱化，結尾 lz
creativity 五個音節 cre-a-TI-vi-ty，重音在 TI
explanation: 寓言故事（烏鴉喝水）。crow = 烏鴉。pitcher = 水壺。pebbles = 小石頭。one by one = 一個接一個。creativity = 創造力。

text: Learning a new language opens doors to different cultures and opportunities. At first, it may feel frustrating when you cannot express yourself clearly. However, every mistake is a step toward improvement. The key is to practice consistently and never be afraid of making errors.
tips: language 的 /ˈlæŋɡwɪdʒ/，重音第一節，/ŋɡw/ 是難點
frustrating 的 /ˈfrʌstreɪtɪŋ/，fr 連發，/ʌ/ 放鬆嘴型
express 的 /ɪkˈsprɛs/，x 發 /ks/，pr 連發
consistently 的 /kənˈsɪstəntli/，重音第二節 sis
explanation: 語言學習心得。opens doors to = 開啟…的大門。frustrating = 令人挫折的。step toward improvement = 朝進步的一步。make errors = 犯錯。

text: Taiwan is a beautiful island surrounded by the Pacific Ocean. From the towering mountains in the center to the sandy beaches along the coast, there is so much to explore. The island is also famous for its delicious night market food and friendly people who always welcome visitors with a warm smile.
tips: island 的 s 不發音 /ˈaɪlənd/，注意不要唸 s
surrounded 的 /səˈraʊndɪd/，s 後的 /raʊ/ 雙母音
towering 的 /ˈtaʊərɪŋ/，/aʊ/ 大口 a 滑到 u
delicious 的 /dɪˈlɪʃəs/，ci 發 /ʃ/，像中文「需」
explanation: 台灣風土描述。surrounded by = 被…環繞。Pacific Ocean = 太平洋。towering mountains = 高聳山脈。famous for = 以…聞名。

text: Have you ever thought about what you want to be in the future? Some people dream of becoming doctors, engineers, or artists. Others hope to start their own businesses or travel around the world. Whatever you choose, remember that success comes from hard work, passion, and never giving up.
tips: thought 的 th 是無聲子音 /θɔːt/，和 though /ðoʊ/ 不同
engineers 的 /ˌɛndʒɪˈnɪrz/，重音第三節 neer，g 發 /dʒ/
businesses 三個音節 BUS-i-ness-es，注意 es 結尾
success 的 /səkˈsɛs/，重音第二節 cess，兩個 c 都發 /k/
explanation: 生涯規劃。Have you ever thought about... = 你曾想過…嗎。dream of + V-ing = 夢想做。start one's own business = 創業。comes from = 來自。

text: Dolphins are among the most intelligent animals on the planet. They communicate with each other using a variety of clicks, whistles, and body movements. Scientists have discovered that dolphins can recognize themselves in mirrors, which means they may have self-awareness. Protecting these wonderful creatures should be everyone's responsibility.
tips: dolphins 的 /ˈdɑːlfɪnz/，ph 發 /f/，不是 /p/
intelligent 四個音節 in-TEL-li-gent，重音第二節
variety 的 /vəˈraɪəti/，v 上齒咬下唇，重音第二節 rai
awareness 的 /əˈwɛrnəs/，a 弱化，ware 重音，/wɛr/
explanation: 動物知識介紹。among the most = 最…之一。communicate with each other = 互相溝通。recognize themselves = 認出自己。self-awareness = 自我意識。

text: The Great Wall of China is one of the most amazing structures ever built. It stretches for more than twenty-one thousand kilometers across mountains and deserts. The wall was originally constructed to protect ancient China from invaders. Today, millions of tourists visit it every year to admire its greatness.
tips: great 的 /ɡreɪt/，gr 連發，ea 發 /eɪ/
stretches 的 /strɛtʃɪz/，str 三子音連發，tch 發 /tʃ/
constructed 的 /kənˈstrʌktɪd/，重音第二節 struct
ancient 的 /ˈeɪnʃənt/，c 發 /ʃ/，像「許」
explanation: 世界遺產介紹。ever built = 曾經被建造。stretches for = 延伸達。originally constructed = 最初建造。admire its greatness = 讚嘆其偉大。

text: True friendship is not about how long you have known someone. It is about who walks into your life and says, "I am here for you," and then proves it. A real friend celebrates your successes, supports you during hard times, and never judges you for your mistakes. Treasure the people who truly care about you.
tips: friendship 的 /ˈfrɛndʃɪp/，d 和 sh 之間要停頓
proves 的 /pruːvz/，pr 連發，v 上齒咬下唇，結尾 vz
celebrates 的 /ˈsɛləbreɪts/，重音第一節，br 連發
treasure 的 /ˈtrɛʒər/，tr 連發，ea 發 /ɛ/，s 發 /ʒ/
explanation: 友誼論述。not about = 不在於。prove = 證明。celebrate successes = 慶祝成功。hard times = 困難時期。judge = 評判。treasure = 珍惜。

text: Water is essential for all living things on Earth. The human body is made up of about sixty percent water. Without it, we would not survive for more than a few days. That is why we must protect our water sources from pollution and use this precious resource wisely.
tips: essential 的 /ɪˈsɛnʃəl/，重音第二節，tial 發 /ʃəl/
survive 的 /sərˈvaɪv/，重音第二節 vive，兩個 v 都要咬唇
pollution 的 /pəˈluːʃən/，重音第二節 lu，ll 發 /l/
precious 的 /ˈprɛʃəs/，ci 發 /ʃ/，像「需」
explanation: 水資源科普。essential for = 對…不可或缺。made up of = 由…組成。survive = 存活。protect from pollution = 保護不受汙染。precious resource = 珍貴資源。

text: Volunteering is a wonderful way to give back to your community. Whether you help at an animal shelter, clean up a local park, or teach children to read, your time and effort can change lives. More importantly, volunteering teaches you empathy and helps you appreciate the things you have in your own life.
tips: volunteering 的 /ˌvɑːlənˈtɪrɪŋ/，v 咬唇，重音第三節 teer
whether 的 /ˈwɛðər/，th 是有聲子音 /ð/，和 weather 同音
shelter 的 /ˈʃɛltər/，sh 發 /ʃ/，l 後 tər
empathy 的 /ˈɛmpəθi/，th 是無聲子音，重音第一節 EM
explanation: 志工服務。give back to = 回饋。community = 社區。animal shelter = 動物收容所。more importantly = 更重要的是。appreciate = 感恩。

text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is rapidly changing the world around us. From self-driving cars to virtual assistants like Siri, AI is becoming a part of our daily lives. While AI brings many exciting possibilities, experts remind us to think carefully about how we use it. Technology should serve humanity, not replace it.
tips: artificial 四個音節 ar-ti-FI-cial，重音第三節 fi
intelligence 四個音節 in-TEL-li-gence，重音第二節
rapidly 的 /ˈræpɪdli/，r 要捲，æ 大嘴，p 輕送氣
humanity 的 /hjuːˈmænəti/，重音第二節 ma，/hjuː/ 嘟嘴
explanation: AI 科技簡介。artificial intelligence = 人工智慧。self-driving cars = 自駕車。virtual assistants = 虛擬助理。serve humanity = 服務人類。

text: Life is not always smooth sailing. There will be storms, and there will be sunny days. What matters most is how you handle the challenges that come your way. Instead of complaining about the rain, learn to dance in it. A positive attitude can turn even the darkest clouds into a beautiful rainbow.
tips: smooth 的 th 是有聲子音 /ð/，結尾 /smuːð/
challenges 的 /ˈtʃælɪndʒɪz/，/tʃ/ 像「吃」，/æ/ 大嘴
complaining 的 /kəmˈpleɪnɪŋ/，重音第二節 plain
attitude 的 /ˈætɪtuːd/，重音第一節，/æ/ 大嘴，注意 tt
explanation: 人生哲理。smooth sailing = 一帆風順。handle challenges = 處理挑戰。complaining about = 抱怨。positive attitude = 正面態度。rainbow = 彩虹。

text: Bubble tea, also known as boba tea, originated in Taiwan in the 1980s. It combines sweet milk tea with chewy tapioca pearls, creating a unique and addictive taste. Today, bubble tea shops can be found in cities all over the world, from New York to London to Tokyo. It has truly become a global phenomenon.
tips: originated 的 /əˈrɪdʒɪneɪtɪd/，重音第二節 ri，g 發 /dʒ/
tapioca 的 /ˌtæpiˈoʊkə/，重音第三節 o，pearls 的 /pɜːrlz/
addictive 的 /əˈdɪktɪv/，重音第二節 dic，/æ/ 不是 /eɪ/
phenomenon 四個音節 phe-NO-me-non，重音第二節 no
explanation: 珍珠奶茶文化。also known as = 也被稱為。originate = 起源。combine... with... = 結合。chewy tapioca pearls = Q彈的珍珠。global phenomenon = 全球現象。

text: Reading books is like taking a journey without leaving your chair. Through the pages, you can travel to magical kingdoms, explore the deep ocean, or walk on distant planets. Besides being entertaining, reading improves your vocabulary, strengthens your imagination, and helps you understand different perspectives on life.
tips: journey 的 /ˈdʒɜːrni/，j 發 /dʒ/，r 要捲，our 發 /ɜːr/
magical 的 /ˈmædʒɪkəl/，g 發 /dʒ/，不是 /ɡ/
strengthens 的 /ˈstrɛŋθənz/，ng 後接 th 無聲，很難
perspectives 的 /pərˈspɛktɪvz/，重音第二節 spec
explanation: 閱讀的價值。take a journey = 展開旅程。through the pages = 透過書頁。besides being = 除了…之外。improve vocabulary = 增進字彙。imagination = 想像力。

text: We often focus so much on physical health that we forget about mental health. Feeling stressed, anxious, or sad is completely normal, and talking to someone you trust can make a huge difference. Remember that it is okay not to be okay. Taking care of your mind is just as important as taking care of your body.
tips: physical 的 /ˈfɪzɪkəl/，ph 發 /f/，重音第一節 phy
anxious 的 /ˈæŋkʃəs/，x 發 /kʃ/，io 發 /ə/ 弱化
completely 的 /kəmˈpliːtli/，重音第二節 plete，/pliːt/
important 的 /ɪmˈpɔːrtənt/，重音第二節 por，r 要捲
explanation: 心理健康。focus on = 專注於。physical health vs mental health。stressed/anxious/sad = 壓力大/焦慮/難過。take care of = 照顧。just as important as = 和…一樣重要。

text: The invention of the Internet has completely transformed the way we access information. Before the Internet, people had to visit libraries or read newspapers to find what they needed. Now, with just a few clicks, we can search for almost anything in seconds. However, we must learn to tell the difference between reliable sources and fake news.
tips: invention 的 /ɪnˈvɛnʃən/，v 咬唇，重音第二節 ven
transformed 的 /trænsˈfɔːrmd/，重音第二節 form，/ɔːr/ 捲舌
access 的 /ˈæksɛs/，cc 發 /ks/，重音第一節
reliable 的 /rɪˈlaɪəbəl/，重音第二節 li，/aɪ/ 雙母音
explanation: 網路發明。access information = 取得資訊。had to = 必須（過去式）。reliable sources = 可靠來源。fake news = 假新聞。

text: Looking up at the night sky has always filled humans with wonder and curiosity. In 1969, Neil Armstrong became the first person to walk on the moon. His famous words, "That's one small step for a man, one giant leap for mankind," still inspire us today. Who knows what exciting discoveries await us among the stars in the future?
tips: curiosity 的 /ˌkjʊriˈɑːsəti/，重音第三節 o，/kjʊ/ 嘟嘴
giant 的 /ˈdʒaɪənt/，g 發 /dʒ/，i 發 /aɪ/ 雙母音
discoveries 的 /dɪˈskʌvəriz/，重音第二節 cov，/ʌ/ 放鬆
among 的 /əˈmʌŋ/，a 弱化，ong 發 /ʌŋ/，不是 /ɔːŋ/
explanation: 太空探索。filled with wonder = 充滿驚嘆。giant leap = 巨大的一躍。mankind = 人類。await = 等待。among the stars = 在星空之中。

text: Time management is an important skill that every student should develop. Instead of waiting until the last minute to finish your homework, try breaking big tasks into smaller parts. Make a simple schedule and stick to it. When you finish your work early, you will have more free time to enjoy your hobbies and relax.
tips: management 三個音節 MAN-age-ment，重音第一節，/æ/ 大嘴
develop 的 /dɪˈvɛləp/，重音第二節 vel，v 咬唇
schedule 美式唸 /ˈskɛdʒuːl/，英式唸 /ˈʃɛdjuːl/，此用美式
hobbies 的 /ˈhɑːbiz/，o 發 /ɑː/，bb 只有一個 b 音
explanation: 時間管理。time management = 時間管理。at the last minute = 最後一刻。break into = 拆成。stick to it = 堅持。free time = 空閒時間。

text: Halloween is celebrated on October thirty-first every year in many countries. Children dress up in creative costumes and go trick-or-treating in their neighborhoods. Houses are decorated with carved pumpkins, fake spider webs, and spooky ghosts. Although it started as a Western tradition, Halloween has become quite popular in many Asian countries as well.
tips: Halloween 的 /ˌhæloʊˈiːn/，重音在 een，/hæ/ 張嘴
costumes 的 /ˈkɑːstuːmz/，重音第一節，/ɑː/ 像「阿」
neighborhoods 的 /ˈneɪbərhʊdz/，ei 發 /eɪ/，gh 不發音
spooky 的 /ˈspuːki/，oo 長音，和 book 的 /ʊ/ 不同
explanation: 萬聖節介紹。dress up = 裝扮。trick-or-treating = 不給糖就搗蛋。carved pumpkins = 雕刻南瓜。spooky = 令人毛骨悚然的。as well = 也。

text: Every great achievement begins with the decision to try. You do not need to be perfect to start; you just need to start to become better. Along the way, you will face doubts and setbacks, but each challenge is an opportunity to grow stronger. Believe in yourself, keep moving forward, and one day you will look back and be proud of how far you have come.
tips: achievement 的 /əˈtʃiːvmənt/，重音第二節 chieve，ch 發 /tʃ/
decision 的 /dɪˈsɪʒən/，s 後接 i 發 /ʒ/，像「日」
setbacks 的 /ˈsɛtbæks/，t 和 b 之間要停頓，/æ/ 大嘴
forward 的 /ˈfɔːrwərd/，第一個 r 要捲，和 w 不同
explanation: 堅持與成長。every great achievement = 每個偉大成就。begin with = 始於。face doubts and setbacks = 面對質疑與挫折。opportunity to grow = 成長的機會。how far you have come = 你走了多遠。
